summary: High‑energy two‑set show with a well‑balanced, apparently top‑quality source
review: Reviewers praise this recording as the best available version of the concert, noting two strong, high‑energy sets. While no specific technical details are given, the comment that it "sounds the best" suggests a clear and satisfying listening experience.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderately detailed review (4 ★) describing both good performance and favorable sound quality, leading to an overall solid rating but limited data for higher confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer says this version "sounds the best," implying clear and well‑balanced audio despite no explicit source details.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Two good, high‑energy sets are highlighted as a strong overall performance.
